mapper.select: WITH month_days AS ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') + LEVEL - 1 AS stay_date FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) - TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') ), sold_nights AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS sold_cnt FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id JOIN month_days d ON d.stay_date >= TRUNC(r.checkin_date) AND d.stay_date < TRUNC(r.checkout_date) WHERE rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND rt.is_active = 'Y' AND r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED','CHECKED_IN','CHECKED_OUT') ), supply_nights AS ( SELECT NVL(SUM(rs.available_count), 0) AS supply_cnt FROM room_stock rs JOIN room_type rt ON rs.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND rt.is_active = 'Y' AND rs.is_closed = 'N' AND rs.stay_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND rs.stay_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) ) SELECT TO_CHAR( ROUND( NVL((SELECT sold_cnt FROM sold_nights), 0) / NULLIF(NVL((SELECT supply_cnt FROM supply_nights), 0), 0) * 100 , 2) ) FROM dual

SELECT TO_CHAR( NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'PAID' THEN p.payment_amount WHEN p.payment_status = 'PARTIAL_CANCEL' THEN p.payment_amount - NVL(p.refunded_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) ) FROM payment p WHERE p.paid_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND p.paid_at < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) AND p.payment_status IN ('PAID','PARTIAL_CANCEL') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE r.payment_id = p.payment_id AND rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} )

SELECT TO_CHAR( ROUND( NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN r.reservation_status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) / NULLIF( SUM( CASE WHEN r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED','CANCELLED','CHECKED_IN','CHECKED_OUT','NO_SHOW') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) * 100 , 2) ) FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND r.created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND r.created_at < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)

WITH sales_data AS ( SELECT NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'PAID' THEN p.payment_amount WHEN p.payment_status = 'PARTIAL_CANCEL' THEN p.payment_amount - NVL(p.refunded_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS sales_amt FROM payment p WHERE p.paid_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND p.paid_at < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) AND p.payment_status IN ('PAID','PARTIAL_CANCEL') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE r.payment_id = p.payment_id AND rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} ) ), supply_data AS ( SELECT NVL(SUM(rs.available_count), 0) AS supply_cnt FROM room_stock rs JOIN room_type rt ON rs.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND rt.is_active = 'Y' AND rs.is_closed = 'N' AND rs.stay_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND rs.stay_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) ) SELECT TO_CHAR( ROUND( NVL((SELECT sales_amt FROM sales_data), 0) / NULLIF(NVL((SELECT supply_cnt FROM supply_data), 0), 0) , 0) ) FROM dual

WITH month_days AS ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') + LEVEL - 1 AS stay_date FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) - TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') ), sold_nights AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS sold_cnt FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id JOIN month_days d ON d.stay_date >= TRUNC(r.checkin_date) AND d.stay_date < TRUNC(r.checkout_date) WHERE rt.is_active = 'Y' AND h.active_yn = 'Y' AND r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED','CHECKED_IN','CHECKED_OUT') ), supply_nights AS ( SELECT NVL(SUM(rs.available_count), 0) AS supply_cnt FROM room_stock rs JOIN room_type rt ON rs.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE rt.is_active = 'Y' AND h.active_yn = 'Y' AND rs.is_closed = 'N' AND rs.stay_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND rs.stay_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) ) SELECT TO_CHAR( ROUND( NVL((SELECT sold_cnt FROM sold_nights), 0) / NULLIF(NVL((SELECT supply_cnt FROM supply_nights), 0), 0) * 100 , 2) ) FROM dual

SELECT TO_CHAR( NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'PAID' THEN p.payment_amount WHEN p.payment_status = 'PARTIAL_CANCEL' THEN p.payment_amount - NVL(p.refunded_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) ) FROM payment p WHERE p.paid_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND p.paid_at < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) AND p.payment_status IN ('PAID','PARTIAL_CANCEL') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE r.payment_id = p.payment_id AND h.active_yn = 'Y' )

SELECT TO_CHAR( ROUND( NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN r.reservation_status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) / NULLIF( SUM( CASE WHEN r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED','CANCELLED','CHECKED_IN','CHECKED_OUT','NO_SHOW') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) * 100 , 2) ) FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE h.active_yn = 'Y' AND r.created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND r.created_at < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)

WITH sales_data AS ( SELECT NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'PAID' THEN p.payment_amount WHEN p.payment_status = 'PARTIAL_CANCEL' THEN p.payment_amount - NVL(p.refunded_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS sales_amt FROM payment p WHERE p.paid_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND p.paid_at < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) AND p.payment_status IN ('PAID','PARTIAL_CANCEL') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE r.payment_id = p.payment_id AND h.active_yn = 'Y' ) ), supply_data AS ( SELECT NVL(SUM(rs.available_count), 0) AS supply_cnt FROM room_stock rs JOIN room_type rt ON rs.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE rt.is_active = 'Y' AND h.active_yn = 'Y' AND rs.is_closed = 'N' AND rs.stay_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND rs.stay_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) ) SELECT TO_CHAR( ROUND( NVL((SELECT sales_amt FROM sales_data), 0) / NULLIF(NVL((SELECT supply_cnt FROM supply_data), 0), 0) , 0) ) FROM dual

WITH curr_paid AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM payment p WHERE p.paid_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND p.paid_at < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) AND p.payment_status IN ('PAID', 'PARTIAL_CANCEL') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE r.payment_id = p.payment_id AND rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} ) ), curr_cancel AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND r.reservation_status = 'CANCELLED' AND r.created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND r.created_at < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) ), prev_paid AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM payment p WHERE p.paid_at >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -1) AND p.paid_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND p.payment_status IN ('PAID', 'PARTIAL_CANCEL') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE r.payment_id = p.payment_id AND rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} ) ), prev_cancel AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND r.reservation_status = 'CANCELLED' AND r.created_at >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -1) AND r.created_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') ) SELECT NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_paid), 0) AS paidCount, NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_paid), 0) AS prevPaidCount, NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_paid), 0) - NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_paid), 0) AS paidDiffCount, CASE WHEN NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_paid), 0) = 0 THEN '0' ELSE TO_CHAR( ROUND( ((NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_paid), 0) - NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_paid), 0)) / NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_paid), 0)) * 100 , 2) ) END AS paidDiffRate,
NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_cancel), 0) AS cancelCount, NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_cancel), 0) AS prevCancelCount, NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_cancel), 0) - NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_cancel), 0) AS cancelDiffCount, CASE WHEN NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_cancel), 0) = 0 THEN '0' ELSE TO_CHAR( ROUND( ((NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_cancel), 0) - NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_cancel), 0)) / NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_cancel), 0)) * 100 , 2) ) END AS cancelDiffRate,
NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_paid), 0) - NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_cancel), 0) AS netCount FROM dual

WITH curr_paid AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM payment p WHERE p.paid_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND p.paid_at < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) AND p.payment_status IN ('PAID', 'PARTIAL_CANCEL') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE r.payment_id = p.payment_id AND h.active_yn = 'Y' ) ), curr_cancel AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE h.active_yn = 'Y' AND r.reservation_status = 'CANCELLED' AND r.created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND r.created_at < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) ), prev_paid AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM payment p WHERE p.paid_at >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -1) AND p.paid_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND p.payment_status IN ('PAID', 'PARTIAL_CANCEL') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE r.payment_id = p.payment_id AND h.active_yn = 'Y' ) ), prev_cancel AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE h.active_yn = 'Y' AND r.reservation_status = 'CANCELLED' AND r.created_at >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -1) AND r.created_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') ) SELECT NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_paid), 0) AS paidCount, NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_paid), 0) AS prevPaidCount, NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_paid), 0) - NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_paid), 0) AS paidDiffCount, CASE WHEN NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_paid), 0) = 0 THEN '0' ELSE TO_CHAR( ROUND( ((NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_paid), 0) - NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_paid), 0)) / NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_paid), 0)) * 100 , 2) ) END AS paidDiffRate,
NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_cancel), 0) AS cancelCount, NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_cancel), 0) AS prevCancelCount, NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_cancel), 0) - NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_cancel), 0) AS cancelDiffCount, CASE WHEN NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_cancel), 0) = 0 THEN '0' ELSE TO_CHAR( ROUND( ((NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_cancel), 0) - NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_cancel), 0)) / NVL((SELECT cnt FROM prev_cancel), 0)) * 100 , 2) ) END AS cancelDiffRate,
NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_paid), 0) - NVL((SELECT cnt FROM curr_cancel), 0) AS netCount FROM dual

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED','CHECKED_IN','CHECKED_OUT') AND TRUNC(r.created_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND r.reservation_status = 'CANCELLED' AND TRUNC(r.created_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT qnaId, title, dateText, refText FROM ( SELECT q.qna_id AS qnaId, q.title AS title, TO_CHAR(q.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS dateText, NVL(q.writer_name, '작성자 미상') AS refText FROM questions q LEFT JOIN answers a ON q.qna_id = a.qna_id WHERE q.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND NVL(q.status, 'WAITING') = 'WAITING' AND a.answer_id IS NULL ORDER BY q.created_at ASC, q.qna_id ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT reservationNo , memberName , roomTypeName , checkinDate , checkoutDate , guestCount , totalPrice , statusCode , statusText FROM ( SELECT inner1.* , ROWNUM AS rnum FROM ( SELECT 'A' || LPAD(r.reservation_id, 6, '0') AS reservationNo , NVL(m.name, '비회원') AS memberName , NVL(rt.room_name, '객실명 미정') AS roomTypeName , TO_CHAR(r.checkin_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS checkinDate , TO_CHAR(r.checkout_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS checkoutDate , r.guest_count AS guestCount , TO_CHAR(NVL(r.total_price, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') AS totalPrice
, CASE WHEN TRUNC(r.checkin_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'CHECKED_IN') THEN 'CHECKIN_TODAY'
WHEN TRUNC(r.checkout_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND r.reservation_status IN ('CHECKED_IN', 'CHECKED_OUT') THEN 'CHECKOUT_TODAY'
WHEN r.reservation_status = 'CHECKED_IN' AND TRUNC(r.checkin_date) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TRUNC(r.checkout_date) > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'STAYING'
WHEN r.reservation_status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 'CANCELLED'
WHEN r.reservation_status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 'CONFIRMED'
ELSE NVL(r.reservation_status, 'UNKNOWN') END AS statusCode
, CASE WHEN TRUNC(r.checkin_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'CHECKED_IN') THEN '오늘 체크인'
WHEN TRUNC(r.checkout_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND r.reservation_status IN ('CHECKED_IN', 'CHECKED_OUT') THEN '오늘 체크아웃'
WHEN r.reservation_status = 'CHECKED_IN' AND TRUNC(r.checkin_date) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TRUNC(r.checkout_date) > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '투숙중'
WHEN r.reservation_status = 'CANCELLED' THEN '취소'
WHEN r.reservation_status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN '예약확정'
ELSE '상태확인' END AS statusText
, CASE WHEN TRUNC(r.checkin_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'CHECKED_IN') THEN 1
WHEN TRUNC(r.checkout_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND r.reservation_status IN ('CHECKED_IN', 'CHECKED_OUT') THEN 2
WHEN r.reservation_status = 'CHECKED_IN' AND TRUNC(r.checkin_date) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TRUNC(r.checkout_date) > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 3
WHEN r.reservation_status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 4
WHEN r.reservation_status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 5
ELSE 99 END AS sortNo
, r.checkin_date AS sortCheckinDate , r.checkout_date AS sortCheckoutDate , r.created_at AS sortCreatedAt , r.reservation_id AS sortReservationId
FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id LEFT JOIN tbl_member_security m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE rt.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND ( ( TRUNC(r.checkin_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'CHECKED_IN') ) OR ( TRUNC(r.checkout_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND r.reservation_status IN ('CHECKED_IN', 'CHECKED_OUT') ) OR ( r.reservation_status = 'CHECKED_IN' AND TRUNC(r.checkin_date) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TRUNC(r.checkout_date) > TRUNC(SYSDATE) ) OR ( r.reservation_status = 'CONFIRMED' AND TRUNC(r.created_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ) OR ( r.reservation_status = 'CANCELLED' AND TRUNC(r.created_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ) ) ORDER BY sortNo ASC , sortCheckinDate ASC , sortCheckoutDate ASC , sortCreatedAt DESC , sortReservationId DESC ) inner1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 ) ORDER BY rnum
